output.sparql:
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q12308 ; rdfs:label ?eventName ; wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P1343 ?winner .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventName) = "en" && CONTAINS(LCASE(?eventName) , "grand national"))
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) = 2017)
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = "en")
}

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
SELECT ?winnerLabel WHERE {
  ?event wdt:P31 wd:Q12308 ; rdfs:label ?eventName ; wdt:P585 ?date ; wdt:P1343 ?winner .
  FILTER(LANG(?eventName) = "en" && CONTAINS(LCASE(?eventName) , "grand national"))
  FILTER(YEAR(?date) = 2017)
  ?winner rdfs:label ?winnerLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?winnerLabel) = "en")
}
```
